name: Last Known Position Search
description: An AI search behavior that stores the player location from the latest credible perception event and investigates it after direct detection is lost.
design_notes: Last-known-position search gives stealth recovery texture after detection. Define update sources, stale timers, search pattern, investigation radius, false clue handling, and checkpoint restore rules. The behavior should make enemies feel observant without granting perfect knowledge after the player breaks line of sight.
design_purpose: Let AI pursue plausible information instead of instantly forgetting or omnisciently tracking the player.
Create recovery play where players can break sight, misdirect, and leave the search area.
Give designers debug traces for why an AI searched a point and when it gave up.
player_fantasy: The player feels hunted but not cheated, watching enemies investigate the place they were last confirmed.

parameters.name: last_known_player_position
parameters.description: Stored position from the latest credible sight, sound, or clue event.

parameters.name: position_stale_after_ms
parameters.description: Interval after which the remembered position loses priority.

parameters.name: investigation_radius_units
parameters.description: Area around the stored position used for search points.

parameters.name: search_pattern_id
parameters.description: Pattern used to choose investigation waypoints.

parameters.name: false_clue_weight_points
parameters.description: Priority bonus or penalty for decoy clues versus confirmed player sightings.

edge_cases: The last known point is inside a locked room, off navmesh, or behind a door the AI cannot open.
A newer noise event and older visual sighting compete for the same AI search slot.
Checkpoint restore during search needs to restore or intentionally clear search state consistently.
Multiple squad members need different cover checks rather than all pathing to the exact same point.
common_bugs: AI updates last_known_player_position every frame through walls because line-of-sight grace never expires.
Search path fails when the remembered point is unreachable and the behavior tree has no fallback.
False clues overwrite confirmed visual contact without priority comparison.
Debug overlays show the current target but not the perception_event_id that created it.
balancing_notes: Long stale intervals make AI feel persistent; short intervals make stealth recovery easier.
Search radius should match level room size and cover density so investigation feels believable.
False clues are powerful only when AI priority rules let them compete without erasing confirmed sightings.
accessibility_notes: Provide readable non-audio indicators when enemies begin searching the last known position.
Avoid hidden omniscience; players should see or infer why a search moved to a specific area.

implementation_notes.unity: Store last_known_player_position, perception_event_id, stale tick, and debug_reason_trace in an AI blackboard. NavMesh queries should clamp unreachable positions to valid investigation points before the behavior tree starts searching.
implementation_notes.godot: Use NavigationServer queries to validate stored search targets and keep the perception source id on the AI state. Search patterns should generate waypoints deterministically so debugging is reproducible.
implementation_notes.unreal: Use Blackboard keys for LastKnownPosition, PerceptionEventId, and SearchPatternId. Behavior tree services should refresh or expire the key using line-of-sight grace, while EQS can choose cover or room-sweep points.
implementation_notes.web: Represent last-known search as AI state with event source, position, stale tick, and waypoint queue. Sort perception updates deterministically and record debug_reason_trace for replayable bug reports.

example_games.title: Metal Gear Solid V
example_games.note: Uses enemy search behavior after guards lose direct sight of the player.

example_games.title: Alien: Isolation
example_games.note: Uses last-known and investigation behavior to sustain stealth pressure.
